SEARCH
Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.typeclass

Interface Applicative<W>

Type Parameters:
W - The witness type of the applicative.
All Superinterfaces:
Functor<W>
All Known Subinterfaces:
Monad<W>
public interface Applicative<W> extends Functor<W>
A typeclass for functors that support functional application and purity.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <A, B> Higher<W,B>
    ap(Higher<W,Function<A,B>> ff, Higher<W,A> fa)
    Applies a function within an applicative context to a value within an applicative context.
    default <A, B, C> Higher<W,C>
    liftA2(BiFunction<A,B,C> fn, Higher<W,A> fa, Higher<W,B> fb)
    Combines two applicative values using a binary function.
    default <A, B> Higher<W,B>
    map(Function<A,B> fn, Higher<W,A> fa)
    Maps a function over the values contained within the functor.
    <A> Higher<W,A>
    pure(A a)
    Lifts a pure value into the applicative context.

  • Method Details

    • pure

      <A> Higher<W,A> pure(A a)
      Lifts a pure value into the applicative context.
